summary: In Kathmandu, Gen Z protesters killed three police officers after storming the streets against a social media ban. Eyewitnesses report the officers were beaten to death even after surrendering. The Nepal Police condemned the killings as barbaric. Protests continue despite Prime Minister KP Sharma Oli''s resignation, with anger over government corruption fueling demonstrations. Violent clashes have resulted in 19 deaths and over 300 injuries nationwide.
headline: Protesters Kill 3 Police in Nepal Amid Social Media Ban Protests

author: News18
summary: Multiple explosions were reported in Doha, Qatar, as Israel conducted air strikes targeting Hamas leaders. The IDF confirmed a precise operation, stating it was an assassination attempt. Hamas''s chief negotiator was reportedly killed. Qatar condemned the strikes as a violation of international law, while Iran and other nations expressed solidarity with Qatar. The attacks coincide with Israel''s intensified military actions in Gaza.
headline: Explosions in Doha as Israel Targets Hamas Leadership in Air Strikes

author: News18
summary: Binod Chaudhary, Nepal''s only billionaire with a fortune of $1.8 billion, heads Chaudhary Group. At 69, he oversees 136 companies, including ''Wai Wai'' noodles and Taj Hotels. His entrepreneurial journey began with a disco in 1973, leading to partnerships with global brands and significant ventures in banking and hospitality. Chaudhary''s sons are set to continue the family''s legacy as he serves in Parliament, inspired by legends like JRD Tata and Nelson Mandela.
headline: Nepal''s Only Billionaire, Binod Chaudhary, Leads Chaudhary Group''s Success

author: News18
summary: Protests erupted in Nepal as youth criticized the lavish lifestyles of “Nepo Kids” amid government corruption. A social media ban triggered anger, leading to over 300 injuries and 19 deaths during demonstrations. Protesters succeeded in toppling KP Sharma Oli''s government, demanding a youth leader to replace him, claiming current politicians are corrupt and out of touch.
headline: Nepal’s Gen Z Protests Lead to KP Sharma Oli’s Resignation Amid Calls for Change

author: News18
summary: This week, three IPOs—Dev Accelerator, Shringar House, and Urban Co—are attracting retail interest. Dev Accelerator''s IPO is priced at Rs 56-61, with 8.29x subscription. Shringar''s price band is Rs 155-165, with 3.32x subscription. Urban Company, valued at Rs 14,790 crore, has a subscription of 4.72x. All IPOs close on September 12, 2023, with listings expected on September 17.
headline: IPO Buzz: Shringar House, Dev Accelerator, Urban Co Subscription Status & GMP

author: News18
summary: Tata Consultancy Services launched chiplet-based engineering services on September 11 to aid semiconductor firms in designing faster processors. Shares rose 0.08% to Rs 3,112. Chiplets allow for flexible designs, reducing costs and speeding up product launches. TCS collaborates with a North American firm to integrate chiplets for AI processors. The Indian semiconductor market is projected to grow from $45-50 billion in 2024-25 to $100-110 billion by 2030.
headline: TCS Unveils Chiplet-Based Services to Enhance Semiconductor Design

author: News18
summary: Central banks globally, from New Delhi to Washington, are major buyers of gold. In a digital money age, the question arises: why do governments still hoard this ancient metal?
headline: Central Banks Worldwide Stockpile Gold Amid Digital Currency Era

author: News18
summary: Motilal Oswal Financial Services forecasts silver could hit Rs 1.5 lakh per kg in a year, driven by industrial demand and a weaker dollar. Silver has gained nearly 37% year-to-date on MCX. The report expects prices to reach Rs 1,35,000 in six months. Factors include demand from green tech and investment in silver ETFs. However, some profit booking may occur after recent gains.
headline: Silver Price May Reach Rs 1.5 Lakh in 12 Months, Says Motilal Oswal

author: News18
summary: Following KP Sharma Oli''s resignation, Gen Z protesters asserted their movement is non-violent, rooted in peaceful civic engagement. They distanced themselves from external agitators and requested the Nepal army to enforce curfews for safety. The group emphasized accountability and transparency, stating their protests do not welcome opportunists. The army and security officials urged dialogue to resolve the crisis after violence erupted, including arson at government buildings.
headline: Gen Z Protesters Clarify Non-Violent Intent Amid Nepal Agitation

author: News18
summary: Gen Z protestors freed former Deputy PM Rabi Lamichhane and over 1,500 inmates from Nakkhu Prison in Kathmandu. This occurred during protests against the government''s social media ban. Police withdrew, allowing inmates to exit. Lamichhane''s release, seen as a political shift, follows the resignation of 21 MPs from his party, deepening Nepal''s political crisis. Protests have escalated, resulting in 19 deaths and over 300 injuries.
headline: Gen Z Protestors Free Rabi Lamichhane and 1,500 Inmates Amid Unrest in Nepal

author: News18
summary: Violent protests in Nepal, led by Gen Z, escalated as demonstrators set fire to the Supreme Court and a media office. The unrest, sparked by a ban on social media, resulted in 19 deaths and over 300 injuries. Prime Minister KP Sharma Oli resigned amid the chaos, which included attacks on political leaders'' residences, with some sustaining severe injuries. Protests intensified despite curfews and the lifting of the social media ban.
headline: Nepal Protests Turn Violent, Supreme Court and Media Office Set on Fire

author: News18
summary: The RBI announced early redemption of Sovereign Gold Bonds 2019-20 Series X on September 11, 2025. The price is set at Rs 10,905 per unit, a 155.99% gain over the issue price of Rs 4,260. The bonds, launched in November 2015, offered a fixed annual interest of 2.5%. The government discontinued fresh issuances in October 2023 but existing bonds remain valid for redemption.
headline: RBI Allows Early Redemption of SGB 2019-20 Series X; Investors Get 156% Return

author: News18
summary: Prakash Industries Limited has set September 17, 2025, as the record date for a Rs 1.50 per share dividend for FY 2024-25. Dolly Khanna holds a 2.3% stake with an investment of Rs 66.1 crore. The stock surged 184% over three years, despite a YTD return of 3.26% in 2025. Financials showed revenue of Rs 844.64 crore in March 2025, with net profit rising to Rs 90.83 crore, indicating improved profitability and operational efficiency.
headline: Prakash Industries Sets Record Date for FY25 Dividend, Dolly Khanna Holds 2.3% Stake

author: News18
summary: Urban Company’s IPO, aiming to raise Rs 1,900 crore, received 4.72x subscription by 10:59 am on Sept 11. The price band is Rs 98-103 per share, with allotment on Sept 15 and listing on Sept 17. Retail participation is at 10.76x. Market observers report a grey market premium of Rs 39, indicating strong demand. Brokerages are mixed, with most recommending a subscription for long-term investors.
headline: Urban Company IPO Day 2: 4.72x Subscription, Price Band Rs 98-103, Closes Sept 12

author: News18
summary: The non-audit income tax return (ITR) deadline is September 15, 2025. Missing it incurs penalties, delayed refunds, and loss of tax benefits. Taxpayers, including salaried individuals and NRIs, must file by this date. Late filing incurs a penalty of Rs 5,000 or Rs 1,000 for incomes below Rs 5 lakh. Late submissions also risk scrutiny and refund delays. Early filing avoids last-minute issues and speeds up refund processing.
headline: ITR Filing Deadline September 15: Penalties and Consequences of Missing It

author: News18
summary: The RBI has purchased a 4.61-acre land parcel at Nariman Point from MMRCL for ₹3,472 crore. This deal, registered on September 5, is significant for expanding RBI''s real estate footprint in Mumbai. MMRCL had planned an auction but canceled it after RBI showed interest. The site is expected to be developed for institutional purposes, reinforcing RBI’s presence in India’s financial hub.
headline: RBI Buys 4.61 Acres in Nariman Point for ₹3,472 Crore

author: News18
summary: A user shared a Swiggy order costing INR 1,473, 81% more than INR 810 offline. The post ignited discussions on whether convenience justifies the price hike, with some defending the platform for its delivery and service. Restaurants set menu prices, while platforms like Swiggy charge commissions that lead to higher online costs.
headline: Swiggy Order 81% Costlier Than Offline, Sparks Debate on Convenience

author: News18
summary: The festive season in India is seen as ideal for home buying, with developers offering deals. The government cut GST on construction materials, potentially lowering prices for affordable homes. However, developers may use savings for project completion instead of price cuts. Home loan rates are stable, and buyers should consider festive offers while being cautious of inflated discounts. Waiting could lead to higher prices due to demand and economic growth.
headline: Is Now the Right Time to Buy a House During the Festive Season in India?

author: News18
summary: IT stocks fell Thursday as investors took profits after a 5.5% surge, with caution ahead of US CPI data. The Nifty IT index dropped nearly 1%, with nine of ten stocks declining. Persistent Systems fell 2% to ₹5,326, Infosys dropped 1.38% amid a board meeting for a share buyback, and LTIMindtree shed 1.66%. Sentiment soured ahead of the CPI print, which is projected to rise to 0.3% month-on-month for August.
headline: IT Stocks Decline After 5.5% Rally; Infosys and Wipro Weigh Down Market

author: News18
summary: The top 5 dividend yield mutual funds are ICICI Prudential, Aditya Birla, LIC MF, Templeton India, and UTI. They focus on dividend-paying stocks, aiming for steady returns and long-term growth. ICICI Prudential leads with a 3-year CAGR of 22.82% and AUM of ₹4,765.86 crore. Aditya Birla follows with 20.88% CAGR and ₹1,511.41 crore AUM. Investors should consider risk, expense ratios, and AUM before investing.
headline: Top 5 Dividend Yield Mutual Funds for Steady Returns

author: News18
summary: On September 11, Indian markets gained nearly half a percent. Key stocks include Infosys, which is reviewing a share buyback, and ZEE, facing insolvency proceedings. Vedanta''s Rs 17,000 crore acquisition of JAL has drawn cautious commentary. Tata Motors'' Jaguar Land Rover confirmed a cybersecurity breach. Kotak Mahindra Bank saw share purchases from major investors after a stake offload.
headline: Stocks to Watch: Infosys, ZEE, Tata Motors, Vedanta, Kotak Mahindra Bank

author: News18
summary: Oracle CEO Safra A. Catz''s net worth increased by $412 million to $3.4 billion amid a stock rally after the company reported a 36% rise in shares due to strong FY26 Q1 earnings. Oracle''s revenues rose 12% to $14.9 billion, with cloud revenues up 28% to $7.2 billion. Catz announced a significant increase in Remaining Performance Obligations, now at $455 billion, and expects Oracle Cloud Infrastructure revenue to grow 77% this fiscal year.
headline: Oracle CEO Safra Catz Gains $412M as Stocks Surge 36% Following Strong Earnings

author: News18
summary: Volkswagen India will implement price cuts from September 22, 2025, due to GST 2.0. The Virtus will be cheaper by up to Rs 66,900, the Taigun by Rs 68,400, and the Tiguan R-Line by Rs 3,26,900. Additionally, promotional offers include benefits up to Rs 1.61 lakh on Taigun trims and Rs 3 lakh on the Tiguan R-Line. Other automakers, like Skoda, are also reducing prices and offering discounts.
headline: Volkswagen Cuts Prices on Virtus, Taigun, Tiguan Due to GST 2.0 from Sept 22

author: News18
summary: Indian equities opened mixed on Thursday. The BSE Sensex was down 34 points at 81,391, while Nifty50 slipped 9 points to 24,964. Infosys shares fell 1% ahead of a board meeting on a buyback programme. In broader markets, Nifty MidCap rose 0.04% and SmallCap gained 0.22%. Global markets were mixed; China''s consumer prices fell 0.4% year-on-year. Wall Street''s S&P 500 closed at a record high, rising 0.3%. Investors await US CPI data and jobless claims.
headline: Sensex Gains Over 100 Points, Nifty Tops 25,000; Adani Ports, Eternal Up 2%

author: News18
summary: Active clients on NSE fell to 4.62 crore, down from 5.02 crore, a decline of 39.69 lakh accounts. Factors include a volatile market and Sebi''s tightened regulations like higher margins and curbs on weekly expiries. Many traders are shifting to mutual funds and other managed investments. Brokerages like Groww and Zerodha reported significant client losses, while Sebi''s stricter rules aim to protect retail investors after a study showed 93% of F&O traders lose money.
headline: NSE Active F&O Clients Drop by Nearly 40 Lakh Amid Market Volatility and Sebi Curb

author: Jai Thakur
summary:
नई दिल्ली. सीजी पावर एंड इंडस्टियल सॉल्यूशन लिमिटेड के शेयर बुधवार को 4 फीसदी से अधिक की बढ़त के साथ 769.95 रुपये पर पहुंच गया. दिन का कारोबार खत्म होने तक यह शेयर 28.50 रुपये (3.85%) की तेजी के साथ एनएसई पर 768.60 के स्तर पर बंद हुआ. पिछले एक महीने में इस शेयर ने ठीक-ठाक रिटर्न दिया है. इस दौरान सीजी पावर के शेयरों में 15 फीसदी की तेजी देखी गई है. ब्रोकरेज मानते हैं कि अभी भी इस शेयर में बहुत दम बचा है.
मॉर्गन स्टेनली की मानें तो यह 799 रुपये तक पहुंच सकता है. ग्लोबल ब्रोकरेज ने इसे ओवरवेट की श्रेणी में डाला हुआ है. मॉर्गन स्टेनली के अनुसार, भारत के कैपिटल गुड्स मार्केट में सीजी पावर सबसे अधिक डायवर्सिफाइड कंपनी है. साथ ही उन्होंने कंपनी की मजबूत मैन्युफैक्चरिंग क्षमता पर भी लोगों को ध्यान आकर्षित किया है. ब्रोकरेज के अनुसार, कंपनी पावर सेक्टर में तो अच्छी ग्रोथ कर ही रही है इसके अलावा सेमीकंडक्टर और रेलवे सेक्टर में भी अपनी क्षमता का विस्तार कर रही है. बिजनेस टुडे की एक खबर के मुताबिक, घरेलू ब्रोकरेज चॉइस इक्विटी ब्रोकिंग ने भी इस शेयर पर बुलिश स्टैंड लिया है. उनके अनुसार, यह शेयर 872 रुपये तक जा सकता है. हालांकि, चॉइस ब्रोकिंग ने इस शेयर को 760.50 रुपये पर खरीदने की सलाह दी है. साथ ही 709 रुपये का स्टॉपलॉस भी सजेस्ट किया है.
ये भी पढ़ें- Best Passive Funds : सोना-चांदी के दम पर बंपर मुनाफा, एसबीआई के इन तीन फंड्स ने कराई झमाझम कमाई
चॉइस का एनालिसिस
चॉइस ने अपनी एनालिसिस में बताया कि यह स्टॉक हाल ही में अपने लॉन्ग-टर्म पैरलल चैनल से बाहर निकला है. यह चैनल साप्ताहिक चार्ट (weekly chart) पर देखा गया, जो लंबे समय तक स्टॉक की कीमतों की रेंज को दर्शाता है. पैरलल चैनल एक टेक्निकल पैटर्न है, जिसमें स्टॉक की कीमत दो समानांतर लाइनों (सपोर्ट और रेजिस्टेंस) के बीच चलती है. जब स्टॉक इस चैनल के ऊपरी हिस्से (रेजिस्टेंस) को तोड़ता है, तो इसे ब्रेकआउट कहते हैं, जो तेजी का मजबूत संकेत है.
इस स्टॉक ने न सिर्फ ब्रेकआउट किया, बल्कि ब्रेकआउट लेवल का रीटेस्ट भी सफलतापूर्वक पूरा किया. रीटेस्ट का मतलब है कि स्टॉक की कीमत ब्रेकआउट के बाद वापस उस स्तर पर आई और वहां टिक गई, जो दिखाता है कि बाजार इस नई कीमत को स्वीकार कर रहा है. यह एक सकारात्मक संकेत है, क्योंकि यह दर्शाता है कि स्टॉक में ऊपर की ओर नई गति शुरू हो चुकी है.
बुलिश कैंडल फॉर्मेशन
स्टॉक के साप्ताहिक चार्ट पर एक मजबूत बुलिश कैंडल बनी है. कैंडलस्टिक चार्ट में बुलिश कैंडल तब बनती है, जब स्टॉक की कीमत दिन की शुरुआत से ज्यादा ऊपर बंद होती है. यह दिखाता है कि खरीदार बाजार में हावी हैं. इस कैंडल के साथ हाई ट्रेडिंग वॉल्यूम भी देखा गया, जो दर्शाता है कि ज्यादा निवेशक इस स्टॉक को खरीद रहे हैं. इसे स्ट्रॉन्ग एक्यूमुलेशन (जमाव) कहते हैं, यानी बड़े निवेशक इस स्टॉक में पैसा लगा रहे हैं.
रिलेटिव स्ट्रेंथ इंडेक्स (RSI)
RSI एक मोमेंटम इंडिकेटर है, जो स्टॉक की तेजी या मंदी की ताकत मापता है. इस स्टॉक का RSI वर्तमान में 67.31 पर है और ऊपर की ओर बढ़ रहा है. RSI में पॉजिटिव क्रॉसओवर हुआ है, जो तेजी का संकेत देता है. RSI 70 से ऊपर जाने पर स्टॉक ओवरबॉट हो सकता है, लेकिन अभी यह एक स्वस्थ तेजी की रेंज में है.
ये भी पढे़ं- देश में पहली बार एक ट्रैक पर दौड़ेंगी नमो भारत और मेरठ मेट्रो! पीएम मोदी जल्द करेंगे इस अनोखे प्रोजेक्ट का उद्घाटन
मूविंग एवरेज के ऊपर ट्रेडिंग
स्टॉक वर्तमान में अपने प्रमुख मूविंग एवरेज (जैसे 50-दिन, 100-दिन, 200-दिन) से ऊपर ट्रेड कर रहा है. मूविंग एवरेज स्टॉक की औसत कीमत को दर्शाते हैं और इसका ऊपर होना बुलिश सेंटिमेंट (सकारात्मक बाजार भावना) को मजबूत करता है. यह दिखाता है कि स्टॉक की कीमत लंबे समय तक स्थिर रह सकती है.

(Disclaimer: यहां बताए गया स्टॉक्स सिर्फ जानकारी देने के उद्देश्य से हैं. यदि आप इनमें से किसी में भी पैसा लगाना चाहते हैं तो पहले सर्टिफाइड इनवेस्‍टमेंट एडवायजर से परामर्श कर लें. आपके किसी भी तरह की लाभ या हानि के लिए लिए News18 जिम्मेदार नहीं होगा.)
headline: पावर कंपनी के शेयरों पर बुलिश हुए 2 ब्रोकरेज, हर स्टॉक पर 100 रुपये का मुनाफा?

author: News18
summary: Union Minister Piyush Goyal hopes the auto industry will pass on GST benefits to consumers as the government addresses the unclaimed compensation cess on dealer stocks. The revised GST rates, effective September 22, reduce tax burdens on various vehicles. Dealers express concerns over the cess burden and are exploring legal options. Goyal emphasizes the need for fair competition and highlights ongoing free trade agreement negotiations to enhance market variety.
headline: Goyal Urges Auto Industry to Pass GST Benefits to Consumers Amid Cess Issue

author: News18
summary: On September 11, gold prices fell on MCX: 24K gold at Rs 1,08,718, silver at Rs 1,25,080. In Mumbai, 24K gold was Rs 1,10,519, and 22K gold was Rs 1,01,310. Rahul Kalantri from Mehta Equities noted mixed trading influenced by U.S. inflation data. Key city rates include Delhi at Rs 1,10,670 for 24K and Rs 1,01,460 for 22K. Gold prices are affected by international rates, import duties, and market fluctuations.
headline: Gold Prices Fall on MCX; Check Rates for 22K and 24K Gold in Key Cities

author: News18
summary: In August 2025, gold ETFs attracted Rs 2,190 crore, their highest inflows in seven months, while silver ETFs drew Rs 1,759 crore. Gold prices rose 5% to Rs 1,01,967 per 10 grams, with a year-on-year increase of 35–40%. Silver prices gained 9%, peaking at Rs 1,17,468 per kg, up 40–45% year-on-year. Experts highlight gold''s role as a hedge against inflation and currency fluctuations amid global uncertainty.
headline: Gold and Silver ETFs See Strong Inflows Amid Rising Investor Demand

author: News18
summary: iPhone 17 Pro Max costs Rs 1,49,900 in India, while it’s $1,199 in the US. High taxes and duties account for 40% of the retail price in India. Apple’s assembly in India involves significant imports, limiting cost reductions. The company positions iPhones as luxury products, maintaining high margins. Despite some tax incentives, prices may only drop 5–10% if India increases local production of components.
headline: iPhone Prices Higher in India Despite Local Assembly

author: News18
summary: Oracle shares surged 36% on Wednesday, reaching USD 328.33, fueled by strong growth in cloud and AI services. This historic gain boosted Larry Ellison''s net worth by $101 billion, surpassing Elon Musk. Oracle''s Q1 results showed a 359% increase in Remaining Performance Obligations, with quarterly revenues up 12% to $14.9 billion. CEO Safra Catz and Chairman Larry Ellison highlighted significant multi-billion-dollar contracts and anticipated future growth in cloud infrastructure and multicloud database revenues.
headline: Oracle Stock Soars 36%, Making Ellison World''s Richest with $393 Billion Net Worth

author: News18
summary: On September 11, 2025, petrol and diesel prices in India were updated by OMCs at 6 AM. Prices remain unchanged since May 2022 due to tax reductions. Key factors influencing prices include global crude oil rates, exchange rates, taxes, refining costs, and demand-supply dynamics. Check city-wise prices via SMS: Indian Oil customers text city code to 9224992249; BPCL customers send “RSP” to 9223112222; HPCL customers text “HP Price” to 9222201122.
headline: Petrol and Diesel Prices Updated for September 11, 2025

author: News18
summary: Amid rising costs, Indian tourists are increasingly choosing lesser-known spots for family trips. A Policybazaar report shows a 45% rise in travel insurance purchases for these destinations. Experts suggest budget-friendly accommodations and local experiences. Pavan Kavad states travelers can save 20-40% by visiting underrated locations. Smart planning, like off-season travel and advanced bookings, can further enhance affordability, according to SOTC''s SD Nandakumar.
headline: Indian Travelers Opt for Lesser-Known Destinations to Save Money

author: News18
summary: Investing Rs 5,000 monthly for 5 years in Post Office RD yields Rs 3,56,830 at 6.7% interest. In contrast, SIP, averaging 12% returns, totals Rs 4,05,518. RD offers guaranteed returns, while SIP presents higher potential profits but carries market risks. The choice depends on an investor''s risk tolerance and financial goals.
headline: Post Office RD vs SIP: Which Investment Grows More in 5 Years?

author: News18
summary: Taxpayers face issues filing ITR for 2025 due to mismatches in Form 26AS, AIS, and Form 16. Experts advise submitting a feedback request for corrections and filing ITR using accurate figures. If discrepancies persist, taxpayers can approach ITAT or courts. Concerns over e-filing portal glitches during peak times have been raised, affecting many taxpayers and CAs.
headline: ITR 2025: How to Handle Mismatches in Form 26AS, AIS, and Form 16

author: News18
summary: India''s top eight metropolitan regions have seen their urban built-up footprint double in three decades, with 2,136 sq km added since 1995, totaling 4,308 sq km by 2025, according to Square Yards. CEO Tanuj Shori noted India faces unprecedented urban migration, requiring nearly 100 million new homes by 2050. Major cities like Ahmedabad, Bengaluru, and Chennai show significant growth, driven by diverse economic sectors and infrastructure improvements.
headline: Urban Built-Up Area in India''s Top-8 Cities Doubles in 30 Years, Report Finds

author: News18
summary: Baiju Bhatt, co-founder of Robinhood, is the only Indian-origin billionaire among the 10 youngest on the 2025 Forbes 400 list. At 40, he holds a $6 billion fortune from a 6% stake in Robinhood. After co-founding the company in 2013 with Vlad Tenev, Bhatt became chief creative officer and remains on the board post-2024. His wealth surged as Robinhood''s stock rose nearly 400% in a year, driven by crypto trading and record revenue.
headline: Baiju Bhatt: Youngest Indian-Origin Billionaire on Forbes 400

author: News18
summary: Investors are advised to create core and satellite portfolios for long-term wealth. The core portfolio includes low-cost investments like index funds, making up 60-80% of assets for stability and consistent returns. The satellite portfolio involves high-risk investments for potential higher returns. Experts recommend investing in large-cap and index funds for the core, while mid and small-cap stocks can be part of the satellite approach.
headline: Understanding Core-and-Satellite Portfolios in Mutual Funds

author: News18
summary: Retirement is shifting in India, with 48% planning mini retirements. HSBC''s report shows 85% believe these breaks enhance life quality. Mini retirements last months to years for personal pursuits. Challenges include financial security (37%) and family obligations (36%). Sandeep Batra notes a need for better financial planning to support this trend, as many seek to balance work and personal goals through multiple career breaks.
headline: Mini Retirements Gain Popularity Among Gen Z and Millennials in India

author: News18
summary: Instagram doesn''t pay for views like YouTube. Earnings come from followers, content quality, and engagement. Brands may approach users with over 10,000 followers for promotions, paying ₹500 to ₹50,000 per Reel. A Reel with 1,000 views can earn ₹100–₹200 if linked to a brand deal. Focus on quality content to make Instagram a source of income.
headline: Instagram Views Don't Directly Pay; Monetization Depends on Brand Deals

author: News18
summary: Equity inflows fell 21% to Rs 33,430 crore in August 2025, down from Rs 42,702 crore in July. Despite this, it marks the 54th consecutive month of positive equity flows. Total assets under management decreased to Rs 75.18 lakh crore. The month saw 23 new schemes raise Rs 2,859 crore, a decline from July''s Rs 30,416 crore. Flexi-cap funds led inflows with Rs 7,679 crore, while mid- and small-cap funds attracted Rs 5,331 crore and Rs 4,993 crore, respectively.
headline: August 2025 Equity Mutual Fund Inflows Drop 21% to Rs 33,430 Crore: AMFI

author: News18
summary: Silver could hit Rs 1.5 lakh per kg in 12 months due to strong demand and a weaker dollar, per MOFSL. The report predicts prices will reach Rs 1,35,000 in six months and $50 per ounce globally. Factors include industrial demand from green tech and ETF investments. The US Federal Reserve''s expected rate cuts and a supply deficit also support the bullish outlook. Caution is advised for near-term profit booking.
headline: Silver May Reach Rs 1.5 Lakh Per Kg in 12 Months, Says MOFSL Report

author: News18
summary: Indian IT stocks surged for the second day, led by Oracle Financial Services Software''s 8% rise. The rally, driven by improving India–US trade relations and Oracle''s strong cloud revenue, boosted investor sentiment. Infosys plans a buyback proposal, enhancing confidence. The rupee''s depreciation also benefits exporters, while broader tech trends continue to influence the sector. Sustainability of this rally depends on trade negotiations and US client budgets.
headline: IT Stocks Rally on Trade Optimism, Nifty IT Index Gains for Second Day

author: News18
summary: A ₹5 lakh investment in Quant Smallcap Fund would have nearly quadrupled in 5 years or more than doubled in 3 years, with 5-year CAGR at 29.80% and 3-year CAGR at 37.40%. The fund''s NAV is ₹253.04, with AUM at ₹29.577 crore. Smallcap mutual funds saw a net inflow of ₹6,484 crore in July, according to AMFI data.
headline: Quant Smallcap Fund: ₹5 Lakh Invested Grew Nearly 4X in 5 Years, 37% Returns in 3 Years

author: News18
summary: Rebel Foods, founded by IIM Lucknow alumni Jaideep Burman and Kallol Banerjee, is valued at $1.4 billion. Launched in Pune in 2011, it revolutionized food delivery with a cloud kitchen model. The company operates over 450 kitchens in 70 cities and expanded internationally. Their brands include Faasos, Oven Story, and Behrouz Biryani. Rebel Foods'' revenue grew to Rs 1,420 crore in FY 2024, inspiring new food entrepreneurs.
headline: IIM Grads Build Rs 1,420 Crore Food Empire with Rebel Foods

author: News18
summary: Many high-income professionals in India are leaving salaried jobs for consultancy due to tax benefits. CA Meenal Goel notes that salaried employees earning Rs 60 lakh face a tax liability of over Rs 18 lakh, while consultants can deduct expenses, significantly lowering their taxable income. For instance, a consultant with Rs 24 lakh income and Rs 12 lakh expenses may have a nil tax liability, despite the risks of irregular income and greater responsibilities.
headline: High-Income Professionals Shift to Consultancy for Tax Savings

author: News18
summary: Over the last decade, Gold outperformed Nifty and Fixed Deposits (FDs). Nifty rose from 7,688 to 24,868 points, with a growth rate of 12.46%. Gold surged from Rs 26,452 to Rs 1,12,655, achieving 15.16% annually. FDs lagged, offering 6-7% returns. While gold provides inflation protection, Nifty remains strong for wealth creation. Investors should choose based on financial goals and risk appetite.
headline: Nifty, Gold, and FDs: 10-Year Performance Comparison

author: News18
summary: HAL''s share price increased 1.38% to Rs 4,515 after signing a Technology Transfer Agreement for SSLV. HAL will absorb technology over two years, then produce SSLVs for global demand. The agreement grants HAL a license for design, manufacturing, and support. Analysts see potential for new revenue streams in small satellite launches, with expected double-digit growth and improved margins. HAL''s Q1FY25 profit rose 9% to Rs 1,306 crore.
headline: HAL Shares Rise After Technology Transfer Pact with ISRO, IN-SPACe & NSIL

author: News18
summary: CEA V Anantha Nageswaran stated India will positively face global challenges at an AIMA event on September 10. India’s real GDP grew by 7.8% in Q1 FY26, driven by economic activity. He noted India is the only G20 economy with steady growth since the pandemic. Fitch Ratings upgraded India’s FY26 growth outlook to 6.9% from 6.5% due to strong domestic demand and financial conditions, following the unexpected GDP growth.
headline: India’s Economy Shows Resilience Amid Global Challenges, Says CEA Nageswaran

author: News18
summary: Urban Company launched its Rs 1,900-crore IPO on September 10, receiving a 3.29x subscription on Day 1. The price band is Rs 98-103 per share, open until September 12. Retail participation was 7.39x. Analysts are divided; some recommend subscribing long-term, citing strong growth potential, while others advise caution. The company aims to raise Rs 472 crore for tech development and marketing. It operates in India and internationally, offering various home and beauty services.
headline: Urban Company IPO Sees 3.3x Subscription on Day 1; Key Details and Broker Opinions

author: News18
summary: The Income Tax Department announced Excel Utilities for updated ITR-5, ITR-6, and ITR-7 forms are live. Available since September 6, these forms cater to various entities, allowing taxpayers to file updated returns for AYs 2021-22 and 2022-23 by the September 15 deadline. Taxpayers can file returns after 48 months from the assessment year end.
headline: Excel Utilities for ITR-5, ITR-6, ITR-7 Now Available for Filing

author: News18
summary: Tech companies in Silicon Valley are racing for AI dominance, adopting a 9-9-6 work culture, where employees work 72 hours weekly. Major firms like Meta and Google are poaching talent with lucrative offers. Meta''s $14.3 billion investment in Scale AI highlights the fierce competition. Since ChatGPT''s launch in late 2020, the AI landscape has rapidly evolved, with no clear leader yet.
headline: Silicon Valley's 9-9-6 Work Culture Emerges Amid AI Gold Rush

author: News18
summary: On September 10, gold fell 0.06% on MCX to Rs 1,08,963 per 10 grams, while silver rose 0.44% to Rs 1,25,011 per kg. In Mumbai, 24-carat gold was priced at Rs 1,10,509 per 10 grams. Market focus shifts to upcoming US inflation data amid geopolitical tensions and revised employment data indicating steep job losses.
headline: Gold Prices Drop on MCX; Silver Sees Minor Rise on September 10

author: News18
summary: The Nifty Auto index rose over 12% since August 18 due to GST 2.0 reforms cutting GST on vehicles to 18%. Analysts favor Maruti Suzuki for its market share and growth potential, with Bajaj Auto noted for its motorcycle presence. Tata Motors shows resilience but faces challenges with Jaguar Land Rover. Price cuts by OEMs follow GST changes, benefiting Maruti and Bajaj, while Tata''s long-term outlook hinges on electric mobility.
headline: Auto Stocks Surge Amid GST 2.0 Reforms: Maruti, Bajaj, Tata Insights

author: News18
summary: Hero MotoCorp will reduce prices of various two-wheeler models by up to Rs 15,743 from September 22, following the GST rate cut. CEO Vikram Kasbekar welcomed the reduction, emphasizing its importance for mass mobility before the festive season. Other manufacturers, including TVS and Yamaha, also announced price cuts due to the GST changes. The GST on motorcycles up to 350cc will drop from 28% to 18%, while higher-capacity bikes will see a rise to 40%.
headline: Hero MotoCorp Cuts Two-Wheeler Prices By Up To Rs 15,743 After GST Rate Reduction

author: News18
summary: Dev Accelerator, Shringar House of Mangalsutra, and Urban Company IPOs are open for subscription from September 10-12. Dev Accelerator''s price band is Rs 56-61, with a 5.34x subscription on day one. Shringar''s price band is Rs 155-165, with a 2.01x subscription. Urban Company, valued at Rs 14,790 crore, has a price band of Rs 98-103 and a 3.29x subscription. All listings are expected on September 17.
headline: IPOs of Dev Accelerator, Shringar House, and Urban Co Open for Subscription

author: News18
summary: Fitch Ratings raised India''s FY26 growth forecast to 6.9% from 6.5% due to strong domestic demand. This follows a surprising 7.8% GDP growth in Q1 FY2025-26, exceeding 7.4% in the previous quarter. Fitch warns of risks, including US tensions, which may affect investor sentiment. The agency expects growth to slow to 6.3% in FY27 and 6.2% in FY28, with domestic demand as the main driver.
headline: Fitch Upgrades India's FY26 Growth Forecast to 6.9% on Strong Demand

author: News18
summary: LIC, SBI Life, HDFC Life, and ICICI Prudential focus on September 10 as CEOs meet Finance Ministry on GST changes. They discuss concerns ahead of GST 2.0 rollout on September 22. The GST Council exempted individual life and health insurance policies from GST, potentially lowering premiums but impacting insurers'' profitability. Insurance stocks gained about 1% amid cautious optimism, supported by positive market sentiment.
headline: Investors Watch Insurance Stocks as CEOs Meet Finance Ministry Today

author: News18
summary: The government permits manufacturers to revise MRP on unsold stock to reflect new GST rates by Dec 31, 2025. Union Minister Pralhad Joshi stated that price changes must match tax adjustments. Companies must display revised MRPs visibly and notify through ads. The recent GST Council meeting approved a dual slab rate system, reducing taxes on many essentials while increasing rates on luxury goods. New rates take effect from September 22, 2025.
headline: Govt Allows MRP Revisions on Unsold Stock After GST Changes

author: News18
summary: The government announced a 5% GST exemption on packaged milk, reducing prices by Rs 3-4 per litre. Amul Gold will drop to Rs 65-66, while Mother Dairy''s full cream milk will also fall to the same range. Current prices are Rs 69 for both brands'' full cream and Rs 57 for toned milk. The new GST rates will apply from September 22, 2025, aiming to make milk more affordable amid rising inflation.
headline: Milk Prices to Drop as GST Exemption Takes Effect September 22

author: News18
summary: Indian stock markets surged on Wednesday with the BSE Sensex at 81,318.18, up 216 points. The NSE Nifty50 gained 85.70 points to 24,953.70. BEL rose 4%, while HCLTech gained 2%. US President Trump announced resumed trade negotiations with India, impacting market sentiment. Asian markets also opened higher, and US indices closed at record highs, anticipating a Federal Reserve interest rate cut.
headline: Sensex Rises 324 Points; Nifty Surpasses 24,950 Amid Trade Deal Hopes

author: News18
summary: With 5 days left for ITR filing for FY2024-25, demands for an extension due to technical glitches have emerged. The deadline has already been extended to September 15, 2025, from July 30, 2025. The Finance Ministry is unlikely to extend it further for non-audit taxpayers, warning of penalties for late filings. Taxpayers needing audits have until October 31, 2025, to file, provided their audit reports are submitted by September 30, 2025.
headline: ITR Filing Deadline Approaches; Extension Demands Arise Amid Technical Issues

author: News18
summary: Bangalore offers vibrant living but finding affordable rentals can be tough. Here are 10 budget-friendly localities: Electronic City (34% rentals Rs 5000-10,000), Kanakapura Road (15% rentals Rs 5,000-10,000), Hoskote (46% rentals Rs 5,000-10,000), BTM Layout (34% rentals Rs 10K-15K), Hebbal (16% rentals Rs 10K-15K), Chandapura (36% rentals Rs 5,000-10,000), Kengeri (39% rentals Rs 5,000-10,000), Yelahanka, Malleshwaram (12% rentals Rs 55K-60K), and Jayanagar (13% rentals above Rs 1L).
headline: Affordable Localities for Renting Houses in Bangalore

author: News18
summary: Vodafone Idea shares rose 2% after the company sought to suspend an additional Rs 9,450 crore AGR demand from the DoT. The firm argues that some charges were counted twice and seeks a recalculation of dues. Of the total demand, Rs 2,774 crore pertains to the post-merger entity, while Rs 5,675 crore relates to pre-merger liabilities. The government has ruled out further relief, leaving Vodafone Idea to rely on internal measures and fundraising.
headline: Vodafone Idea Challenges Rs 9,450 Crore AGR Dues in Supreme Court, Shares Rise 2%

author: News18
summary: The CBIC will consult hospitality, insurance, and textile leaders this week on passing recent GST cuts to consumers. The GST Council''s changes, effective September 22, lower rates for hotel rooms, insurance premiums, and garments. Industry experts caution that ITC removal may dilute consumer benefits. Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman emphasized the need for ongoing dialogue with industry to ensure reductions are passed on.
headline: CBIC to Meet Industry Leaders on Passing GST Cuts to Consumers

author: News18
summary: Zepto offers two franchise models: FOFO requires Rs 30-50 lakh investment, while COFM needs Rs 1-2 lakh. FOFO allows higher profits (Rs 3-4 lakh/month) but involves more risk. COFM provides steady income (15-20% revenue share) with less effort. Visit Zepto''s website to apply and choose based on your financial capacity and commitment.
headline: Start a Zepto Franchise and Earn Up to Rs 5 Lakh Monthly

author: News18
summary: On September 10, 2025, petrol and diesel prices in India remain unchanged since May 2022. Prices are updated daily by OMCs at 6 AM, influenced by global crude oil prices and taxes. City-wise prices include New Delhi (Petrol ₹94.72, Diesel ₹87.62), Mumbai (Petrol ₹104.21, Diesel ₹92.15), and others. Check prices via SMS by texting city codes to designated numbers.
headline: Petrol and Diesel Prices Updated on September 10, 2025

author: News18
summary: Kotak Flexicap Fund has achieved a 14.26% return in six months, surpassing the Nifty''s nearly 11%. It also boasts 16.4% and 20.70% returns on 3-year and 5-year annualised bases, respectively. The fund consistently outperformed its benchmark and peers, demonstrating strong long-term performance with an alpha over 85% of the time. Flexicap funds allow dynamic investment across market caps, targeting sectors with growth potential and resilient companies.
headline: Kotak Flexicap Fund Delivers 14.26% Returns in Six Months, Outperforming Nifty

author: News18
summary: Air miles from credit cards can be used to buy flight tickets. Using co-branded cards like ICICI Bank’s Emirates Sapphiro can boost your miles, while cards like the IndiGo HDFC Bank Credit Card offer rewards on travel spending. Regular flights, choosing the right card variant, leveraging partners, and joining loyalty programs can further enhance your air miles.
headline: Convert Credit Card Points to Free Flights Easily

author: News18
summary: GST 2.0 has reduced car prices in India, with savings from Rs 65,000 to Rs 8.9 lakh effective September 22. Mahindra, Tata, Toyota, and others announced cuts. For example, Mahindra’s Bolero Neo is Rs 1.27 lakh cheaper, Tata''s Nexon is Rs 1.55 lakh lower, and Toyota''s Fortuner is Rs 3.49 lakh less. Other brands like Skoda, BMW, Hyundai, and Maruti Suzuki also implemented significant price reductions across various models.
headline: GST 2.0 Cuts Car Prices in India: Major Reductions by Top Brands

author: News18
summary: IT shares surged on September 9, with the Nifty IT index climbing over 2.5% to 35,197. Infosys rose nearly 5% after announcing a buyback meeting on September 11. Wipro, Mphasis, and others also saw gains. The rally was fueled by expectations of a US Fed rate cut and value buying after recent declines, despite mixed expert opinions on sustainability.
headline: Nifty IT Rises 2.5% Ending Five-Day Slide; Infosys Leads Gains

author: News18
summary: On September 10, 2025, markets gained nearly half a percent. Key stocks include Vodafone Idea, Kotak Bank, and Bajaj Auto. Prakash Industries sets September 17 for a Rs 1.50 dividend. ICICI Prudential Life to discuss fundraising on September 12. Sun Pharma''s Halol plant under Import Alert. Bajaj Auto and Eicher Motors to pass on GST cuts. Tata Motors acquires 26% stakes in renewable energy SPVs. Blue Jet''s promoter to sell shares on September 10-11.
headline: Stocks to Watch: Vodafone Idea, Kotak Bank, Bajaj Auto, Tata Motors, Eicher Motors

author: News18
summary: Jaguar Land Rover (JLR) announced price cuts of up to Rs 30.4 lakh on models like Defender and Discovery, effective September 22, due to GST rationalization. Prices for models will drop between Rs 4.5 lakh and Rs 30.4 lakh. Rajan Amba, MD of JLR India, welcomed the GST changes, stating it boosts confidence in India''s luxury market. The government reduced GST on luxury vehicles to 40% from nearly 50%.
headline: JLR Reduces Prices by Up to Rs 30.4 Lakh Following GST Rate Cut

author: News18
summary: Microsoft mandates employees to work onsite three days weekly from January 2026, ending flexible policies. The rollout will begin in phases, starting in Puget Sound in February. Employees within 50 miles of an office will receive details via email. Managers will get resources to support the transition. Further timelines for other locations will be announced soon.
headline: Microsoft Requires Employees to Work Onsite Three Days a Week Starting 2026

author: News18
summary: Eightco Holdings'' stock surged 3000% on September 08, opening at USD 1.43 and reaching USD 45.08. The spike followed a $270 million private placement and the appointment of AI expert Dan Ives as Chairman. The company plans to raise $250 million by issuing 171.2 million shares at $1.46 each, with proceeds aimed at acquiring Worldcoin. The Nasdaq ticker will change from OCTO to ORBS on September 11.
headline: Eightco Holdings Stock Soars 3000% After Major Announcements

author: News18
summary: Investors are seeking 444-day special FDs for higher returns. SBI offers 6.60%, Punjab & Sind Bank 6.70%, Canara Bank 6.50%, and Indian Overseas Bank leads at 6.75%. For Rs 7.25 lakh, IOB returns could reach Rs 7.87 lakh. These FDs provide better returns than standard options, backed by government banks. Verify rates and consult a financial advisor before investing.
headline: Best Interest Rates on 444-Day Special FDs from SBI, IOB, and More

author: News18
summary: Prozeal Green Energy Limited received SEBI approval for an IPO to raise ₹7,000 million. The offer includes a fresh issue and an offer for sale, with proceeds aimed at funding working capital, subsidiary investments, and general corporate purposes. The company specializes in renewable energy solutions, executing 182 solar projects with a capacity of 783.98 MWp across India and Nepal, and has shown significant revenue growth.
headline: Prozeal Green Energy Secures SEBI Approval for ₹700 Crore IPO

author: News18
summary: Over 4.89 crore taxpayers have filed their income tax returns by September 7, with the deadline approaching. Filing is mandatory regardless of tax liability. Non-filing can incur a fee of up to ₹5,000. Benefits include tax refunds, visa support, and loan applications. Responsible citizens should file their ITRs immediately to comply with tax laws.
headline: File Your ITR by September 15, Even With Zero Tax Liability

author: News18
summary: Shringar House of Mangalsutra IPO opens on September 10, 2025, with a price band of Rs 155–165. The issue closes on September 12, with shares listed on BSE and NSE on September 17. The lot size is 90 shares, costing Rs 14,850 minimum. The IPO aims to raise funds for working capital. Currently, unlisted shares trade at Rs 190, indicating a grey market premium of Rs 25. Analysts recommend subscribing for long-term growth potential.
headline: Shringar House of Mangalsutra IPO Launching Tomorrow; Subscription Details Inside

author: News18
summary: GST 2.0, effective September 22, simplifies rates to 5% and 18%, cutting costs on essential goods. Emkay Global expects boosted consumption and higher stock targets despite awaiting growth momentum. The reform, led by Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman, aims to ease living costs while enhancing compliance for businesses and consumers.
headline: GST 2.0 Rollout to Cut Rates, Lower Living Costs and Boost Consumption

author: News18
summary: A recent Anarock survey reveals 81% of Indians see homeownership as challenging due to rising prices. Property rates in 7 cities surged 50% from Rs 6,001 to Rs 8,999 per square foot from Q2 2023 to Q2 2025. Concerns include a lack of affordable options (62%) and project locations (92%). Mumbai buyers feel the pinch most, with 39% citing price as a primary concern. Demand for larger homes persists, while interest in homes under Rs 45 lakh has dropped significantly.
headline: 80% of Indians Find Homeownership Increasingly Difficult Amid Soaring Prices

author: News18
summary: India''s automakers, led by Mahindra & Mahindra, benefit from GST reforms, boosting earnings outlook. The Nifty Auto index rose 12.5% since Prime Minister Modi''s GST rationalization announcement, while the Nifty 50 gained only 1%. Mahindra''s stock climbed over 15% this month, with other firms like Eicher Motors and TVS Motor also seeing gains. Indian auto companies added nearly $33 billion in market cap in under a month following significant tax cuts announced on September 4.
headline: Auto Stocks Gain $33 Billion as GST Reforms Boost Sales Outlook

author: News18
summary: South Indian Bank has introduced a digital loan facility allowing customers to borrow against mutual funds. The process is paperless and quick, in partnership with Ark Neo Financial Services. Customers can apply with PAN and Aadhaar, with loans of up to 50% for Equity and 70% for Debt Mutual Funds. This service is available to individuals aged 18 to 75, ensuring investments remain intact while providing liquidity.
headline: South Indian Bank Launches Loan Against Mutual Funds for Quick Cash Access

author: News18
summary: India''s Securities Appellate Tribunal ordered Sebi to respond in three weeks on document disclosure in the Jane Street case. Hearings with the trading firm are paused until November 18, delaying any confirmatory order. Jane Street''s appeal seeks documents to counter market manipulation allegations. Sebi stated the investigation is ongoing and broader than initially thought, refusing to release unrelated documents.
headline: SAT Orders Sebi to Respond to Jane Street Appeal, Halts Hearings

author: News18
summary: Working professionals and small business owners often dream of financial stability. Here are six steps to check your finances: 1. Assess if your finances sustain your desired living standard. 2. Ensure you have an emergency fund covering 6-12 months of expenses. 3. Buy life insurance worth 10-15 times your income. 4. Manage debt wisely, keeping EMIs under 40% of income. 5. Invest 20-30% of income for wealth accumulation. 6. Have a strong retirement plan for future security.
headline: Financial Fitness: 6 Steps to Assess Your Money Health

author: News18
summary: Urban Company launches its Rs 1,900-crore IPO on September 10, priced at Rs 98-103 per share. Allotment is on September 15, with listing on September 17. Currently, unlisted shares trade at Rs 136.5, showing a grey market premium of Rs 33.3. The company plans to raise Rs 472 crore for tech development and marketing. 75% of shares are reserved for institutional buyers.
headline: Urban Company IPO Opens Tomorrow; GMP at Rs 33.3 Indicates Strong Listing

author: News18
summary: Gary Lineker received the TV Presenter of the Year Award at the National TV Awards for his work on Match of the Day. He expressed his gratitude and emphasized the importance of using one''s platform to advocate for those without a voice. Lineker, the BBC''s highest-paid presenter, will leave the show after 25 years but will continue with the BBC until the FIFA 2026 World Cup. He also launched a podcast production company, including “The Rest is Football.”
headline: Gary Lineker Wins TV Presenter of the Year at National TV Awards

author: News18
summary: Visa cardholders can apply for FIFA World Cup 2026 tickets from Sept 10-19 via the Visa Presale Draw. Selected entrants will be notified by email after Sept 30 for a chance to purchase tickets. Visa is the exclusive payment method during the presale. FIFA emphasizes the significance of this event and the economic boost it brings to host cities.
headline: Visa Cardholders Get Early Access to FIFA 2026 Tickets from Sept 10

author: News18
summary: NBA commissioner Adam Silver confirmed an investigation into gambling allegations against Malik Beasley. This follows a federal probe earlier this year. Silver stated that Beasley is cooperating with the NBA''s investigation, which concerns improper gambling on NBA games during the 2023-24 season. Beasley, who joined Detroit in July 2024, averaged 16.3 points last season. It remains unclear if he could still face charges.
headline: NBA Probes Gambling Allegations Against Malik Beasley, Adam Silver Confirms

author: News18
summary: NBA commissioner Adam Silver stated there will be no rush to judgment on allegations against the Clippers regarding salary cap violations linked to Kawhi Leonard. Journalist Pablo Torre claimed the team used a bankrupt company to circumvent rules. Silver emphasized the league must prove misconduct, and he will wait for the investigation''s outcome before acting. The Clippers and owner Steve Ballmer have denied the allegations.
headline: Adam Silver Not Rushing Judgment on Clippers, Kawhi Leonard Allegations

author: News18
summary: Benchmark indices closed higher on Tuesday, with the BSE Sensex up 314 points at 81,101 and Nifty50 at 24,869. Infosys led gains, rallying 5% to Rs 1,504 after announcing a share buyback consideration on September 11. Asian markets showed mixed trends, while US indices closed higher, with optimism about potential Federal Reserve rate cuts. Gold surpassed $3,600 as demand for safe-haven assets increased.
headline: Sensex Rises 314 Points; Infosys Surges 5% on Buyback News

author: News18
summary: Nikhat Zareen lost 0-5 to Buse Naz Cakiroglu in the 51kg quarterfinals, ending her medal pursuit. Jaismine Lamboria and Nupur Sheoran secured medals for India, with Jaismine winning 5-0 against Uzbekistan’s Khumorabonu Mamajonovato and Nupur defeating Oltinoy Sotimboeva 4-1. Nupur will face Seyma Duztas in the semifinals.
headline: Nikhat Zareen Exits World Boxing Championships in Quarterfinals

author: News18
summary: Nico Rosberg said he would have unplugged his radio if asked to let a teammate pass at Monza. McLaren''s Andrea Stella ordered a swap between Oscar Piastri and Lando Norris during the race. Piastri called the request fair, but Rosberg jokingly commented on the lack of clarity in team rules. He expressed support for exciting championship battles, acknowledging mixed reactions to the team''s decision.
headline: Rosberg Would Have Ignored Team Orders in McLaren Driver Swap at Monza GP

author: News18
summary: Manchester City forward Omar Marmoush may miss the Premier League match against Manchester United after suffering a knee ligament injury while playing for Egypt. He was withdrawn in the fourth minute of a World Cup qualifier against Burkina Faso. The Egyptian Football Association confirmed the injury, and Marmoush will undergo scans in Cairo. City, currently 13th in the league, face United on Sunday after both teams'' unconvincing starts to the season.
headline: Omar Marmoush Could Miss Manchester Derby Due to Knee Injury on International Duty

author: News18
summary: Tottenham''s Djed Spence made history on Tuesday in Belgrade, becoming the first Muslim to earn a senior cap for England. The 25-year-old debuted in the 69th minute during England''s 5-0 World Cup qualifying win. Spence expressed surprise at the milestone, saying, “It’s a blessing.” His debut is celebrated as a significant moment for British Muslims, who are under-represented in football. Spence''s career includes stints at Middlesbrough and Tottenham, overcoming challenges to establish himself as a reliable right-back.
headline: Djed Spence Becomes First Muslim to Represent England in Senior Football

author: News18
summary: At the Hong Kong Open 2025, HS Prannoy, Lakshya Sen, and Kiran George advanced in men''s singles. Prannoy beat Lu Guangzu 21-17, 21-14, while George triumphed over Jason Teh 21-16, 21-11. Sen won a tough match against Wang Tzu-wei 22-20, 16-21, 21-15. PV Sindhu lost to Line Christophersen 15-21, 21-16, 21-19, marking her first defeat to Christophersen in six encounters.
headline: HS Prannoy, Lakshya Sen, Kiran George Advance at Hong Kong Open 2025

author: News18
summary: England secured a 5-0 win over Serbia in the FIFA 2026 World Cup qualifiers, with goals from Harry Kane, Noni Madueke, Ezri Konsa, Marc Guehi, and Marcus Rashford. Serbia''s Nikola Milenkovic was sent off in the second half. This victory solidifies England''s position at the top of Group K, needing five points from their final three matches to qualify for the World Cup. Thomas Tuchel praised the team''s performance as a '
headline: England Dominates Serbia 5-0 in World Cup Qualifiers

author: News18
summary: France rallied from a goal down to defeat Iceland 2-1 in the FIFA World Cup 2026 Qualifiers at Parc des Princes. Andri Gudjohnsen opened the scoring for Iceland in the 21st minute. Kylian Mbappe equalized from the penalty spot, and Bradley Barcola scored the winner. Despite a red card for Aurelian Tchouameni and a disallowed goal for Iceland, France secured their second win in Group D, now with six points.
headline: France Comes Back to Beat Iceland 2-1 in World Cup Qualifiers

author: News18
summary: Indian boxer Pooja Rani secured her first medal at the Women’s World Championships, defeating Poland’s Emilia Koterska 3-2 in the 80kg quarterfinals. The 34-year-old''s victory guarantees a medal for India as she advances to face Emily Asquith in the semifinals. Meanwhile, the men''s team faced setbacks, with only Jadumani Singh remaining in contention after Abhinash Jamwal''s loss.
headline: Pooja Rani Wins Medal, Advances to World Championships Semifinals

author: News18
summary: Indian badminton stars Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty advanced to the quarterfinals of the Hong Kong Open 2025, defeating Thailand''s Sukphun and Teeraratsakul 18-21, 21-15, 21-11 on Thursday. The duo, ranked 9th in the world, will next face Malaysia’s Junaidi Arif and Roy King Yap. After losing the first game, they rallied to dominate the second and third games, showcasing their skills and determination.
headline: Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty Reach Hong Kong Open Quarterfinals

author: News18
summary: Carlos Alcaraz, US Open 2025 champion, is reportedly dating model Brooks Nader. Her sister, Grace Ann Nader, confirmed their relationship, stating, “The rumours are true.” Brooks attended Alcaraz''s matches at the US Open, where he won against Jannik Sinner, securing his sixth Grand Slam title. Alcaraz triumphed 6-2, 3-6, 6-1, 6-4, solidifying his top ranking.
headline: Alcaraz and Model Brooks Nader Confirm Romance, Says Sister

author: News18
summary: Jamie Vardy, 38, wants to prove he’s not in Italy for retirement after joining Cremonese from Leicester City. He aims to bring passion and commitment, inspired by his admiration for Serie A. Vardy joined on a one-year deal and expressed excitement for a new experience in Italian football culture, eager to show his value and immerse his family in Italy. Cremonese, currently top of Serie A, faces a tough season ahead despite a strong start.
headline: Vardy Aims to Connect with Cremonese Fans After Serie A Move

author: News18
summary: WWE''s Wrestlemania 43 will be held in Saudi Arabia in 2027, marking the first time outside the US and Canada. Turki Alalshikh announced the event as part of Saudi Arabia''s push to enhance its sports culture. The nation has hosted top wrestling events like Crown Jewel. WWE''s recent Wrestlemania featured major matches, including Iyo Sky retaining her title and John Cena claiming the WWE Undisputed Championship.
headline: Wrestlemania 43 Set for Saudi Arabia in Historic First for WWE

author: News18
summary: Steve Mandanda, 40, announced his retirement on Wednesday. The former France goalkeeper''s contract with Rennes expired last July. Mandanda reflected on his decision, stating, “I needed to take my time to accept it.” He had a successful career, winning six trophies with Marseille and was part of the French squad that won the 2018 World Cup. He retired from international football in January 2023 after earning 35 caps.
headline: Steve Mandanda Retires From Professional Football Career

author: News18
summary: Lleyton Hewitt has been suspended for two weeks and fined Aus$30,000 for pushing a doping control official. The ITIA announced the ruling after a tribunal upheld the charge of offensive conduct stemming from an incident following Australia''s Davis Cup defeat to Italy. Hewitt denied wrongdoing, claiming self-defense, but the tribunal found his actions unreasonable. His suspension starts September 24 and lasts until October 7, 2025, impacting his participation in tennis activities.
headline: Hewitt Fined and Suspended for Shoving Doping Official

author: News18
summary: India secured a 4-2 victory over Korea in their Super 4 stage opener of the women’s Asia Cup on Wednesday. Goals came from Vaishnavi Phalke, Sangita Kumari, Lalremsiami, and Rutuja Pisal, while Yujin Kim scored twice for Korea. India, who topped pool stages, will face China next. Bichu Devi Kharibam continues as goalkeeper in Savita Punia''s absence.
headline: India Defeats Korea 4-2 in Women's Asia Cup Super 4 Opener

author: News18
summary: Nupur Sheoran assured India its first medal at the World Boxing Championships by defeating Oltinoy Sotimboeva 4-1 to reach the semifinals in the women’s +80kg category. The 26-year-old boxer, granddaughter of Hawa Singh, entered the quarterfinals directly. Nupur''s cleaner punches proved decisive despite a messy contest, securing at least a bronze medal. Other Indian boxers Jadumani Singh and Abhinash Jamwal also advanced in their categories.
headline: Nupur Sheoran Secures India's First Medal at World Boxing Championships

author: News18
summary: Viktor Axelsen lost to Japan’s Kodai Naraoka 21-15, 21-7 in his first match after back surgery. The defeat, in just 37 minutes, ended his comeback attempt. Axelsen, battling a fever, expressed disappointment over his performance and noted he felt emotional after the match. He will continue his comeback at the China Masters next week, mentioning a positive aspect: “I don’t have much pain in my back.”
headline: Axelsen Eliminated in First Round of Hong Kong Open

author: News18
summary: Ayush Shetty showcased quick thinking by changing his racquet during a rally against Su Li Yang at the Hong Kong Open. After losing the first game 16-21, Shetty tied the second at 6-all when he made the move, eventually winning the point after both players stumbled. He took the second game 21-19 and dominated the third 21-13, advancing to the next round. Shetty is set to face either Kodai Naraoka or Viktor Axelsen next.
headline: Ayush Shetty Changes Racquet Mid-Rally, Wins Point at Hong Kong Open

author: News18
summary: Joao Mendes, son of Ronaldinho, is poised to sign with Hull City after leaving Burnley. He aims to join the club''s U21 setup and establish his own identity in football. Mendes expressed pride in his father''s legacy but wants to be recognized for his own achievements. He has adapted to life in the UK, acknowledging the challenges of the climate while appreciating the local football culture.
headline: Ronaldinho's Son Joao Mendes Set to Join Hull City After Leaving Burnley

author: News18
summary: The USA Men''s National team won 2-0 against Japan in Ohio, with goals from Zendejas and Balogun. Pochettino prefers media scrutiny on him, not his players. He shared his wife''s observation on the different treatment coaches receive in Europe and America. Pochettino called up young players, emphasizing performance over results. Pulisic noted the team''s need for confidence, while Balogun highlighted the importance of patience under Pochettino''s guidance.
headline: Pochettino Shares Wife's Advice After USMNT's Win Over Japan

author: News18
summary: India’s U23 football team defeated Brunei Darussalam 6-0 but was eliminated from the AFC U23 Asian Cup Qualifiers. Despite finishing second in Group H with six points, India needed Qatar to lose, but Qatar won 2-1 against Bahrain. Vibin Mohanan scored a hat-trick, with goals also from Mohammed Aimen and Ayush Chhetri. India ranked fifth among second-placed teams, missing qualification.
headline: India U23 Crush Brunei 6-0 but Exit AFC U23 Asian Cup Qualifiers

author: News18
summary: Real Madrid is likely to boycott the Ballon d’Or ceremony again due to unresolved tensions with organizers. The club''s relationship soured after Vinícius Jr lost to Rodri last year. Despite discussions with France Football, no agreement was reached, and doubts about the scoring system persist. Carlo Ancelotti has yet to receive his Johan Cruyff Award, which remains unawarded in his arsenal.
headline: Real Madrid Expected to Continue Ballon d’Or Boycott This Year

author: News18
summary: Manchester City reached a settlement with the Premier League over APT rules, allowing lucrative sponsorships. The tribunal deemed the regulations “void and unenforceable.” The club anticipates a renewed deal with Etihad Airways worth up to £1.75 billion, potentially the largest in British sports history. Additionally, City signed a £1 billion kit deal with Puma, enhancing its financial prospects.
headline: Manchester City Secures £1.75bn in Sponsorship After PL Settlement

author: News18
summary: India faced disappointment at the ISSF World Cup, with Samrat Rana missing the finals in 10th place. China excelled, winning gold and silver medals. Rana scored 582, while China''s Hu Kai topped with 589 and clinched gold. Amit Sharma finished 28th with 576, and Nishant Rawat 42nd with 568. In women''s 25m pistol, Divya Subbaraju scored 291, placing 7th and remaining in contention for the finals.
headline: Indian Shooters Struggle as China Dominates ISSF World Cup in Rio

author: News18
summary: PV Sindhu lost to Denmark’s Line Christophersen 15-21, 21-16, 21-19 in the Hong Kong Open round of 32. Ranked 15th, Sindhu had a 5-0 record against Christophersen but could not secure a win. This defeat follows a quarterfinal run at the BWF World Championships, highlighting her struggle for consistency this season. Other Indian players also faced losses in various categories.
headline: PV Sindhu Shock Exit at Hong Kong Open After Loss to Line Christophersen

author: News18
summary: During the England vs. Serbia FIFA World Cup qualifier on September 10, crowd disturbances erupted at Belgrade’s Red Star Stadium. As England led 3-0, tensions flared among Serbian fans over a political dispute, prompting security to evacuate families. Riot police intervened, restoring order. Despite the disruption, England secured a 5-0 victory, with goals from Kane, Madueke, Konsa, Guehi, and Rashford.
headline: Riot Police Control Crowd Disturbance During England-Serbia WC Qualifier

author: News18
summary: Barcelona will host Valencia at Estadi Johan Cruyff due to delays in reopening Camp Nou. La Liga granted an exemption for stadium capacity after renovations fell nine months behind. The club is working on permits for the new Spotify Camp Nou and appreciates fan support. League officials inspected Johan Cruyff Stadium for necessary adjustments, while the alternative stadium was ruled out due to poor pitch conditions. Barca has 7 points from three games this season.
headline: Barca's Home Opener Set for Estadi Johan Cruyff Amid Camp Nou Delays

author: News18
summary: Arsenal faces Nottingham Forest in the Premier League on Saturday. Defender Riccardo Calafiori shared his positive mindset and emphasized the importance of focus in every action. He enjoys drinking beetroot juice before games and is excited about facing Tottenham, describing it as the most important match for fans. Calafiori also expressed his love for Indian food and hopes to visit the country. Catch the Premier League action live on Star Sports Network and JioHotstar.
headline: Calafiori Focused on Every Action Ahead of Arsenal's Match Against Nottingham Forest

author: News18

author: News18
summary:
The legal battle over the massive estate of late businessman Sunjay Kapur, ex-husband of Bollywood actress Karisma Kapoor, has entered a pivotal phase. Karisma’s children, Samaira and Kiaan, recently filed a civil suit in the Delhi High Court, alleging that their stepmother, Priya Sachdev Kapur, attempted to manipulate their father’s will. The dispute centers on an estate valued at an estimated Rs 30,000 crore.
Sunjay Kapur’s sister voices support
In a notable development, Mandhira Kapur Smith, Sunjay Kapur’s sister, publicly expressed her support for Karisma Kapoor’s children. Speaking to ANI, she said, “I’m very happy about it because finally the family will know something and have some knowledge about anything really. I believe in the justice system in India, so I’m hoping it will bring more clarity, more visibility and transparency to everything.” Her comments underline the high stakes involved in this estate dispute and bring additional attention to the legal proceedings.
Backing the children’s claim
Mandhira went further, affirming her trust in Samaira and Kiaan’s actions, stating, “I stand by them because I do not think that if anyone knows the relationship they have had with their father and for their father not to have them a part of the will, it just doesn’t add up. Doesn’t make sense. So I stand by them.” Her remarks could influence public perception as the case progresses, highlighting the children’s legal and moral claim to the estate.
Meanwhile, the court has directed Priya Kapur to disclose all movable and immovable assets of Sunjay Kapur as of June 12, 2025. Senior advocate Rajiv Nayar, representing Priya, has countered the lawsuit, arguing it is not maintainable. The legal battle is expected to continue for months, drawing attention from both the media and the public.
Karisma Kapoor and Sunjay Kapur were married in a high-profile wedding in Mumbai in 2003 and had two children together. They divorced by mutual consent in 2016, and Sunjay later married Priya Sachdev in 2017. Sunjay Kapur passed away on June 12, 2025, reportedly due to a heart attack during a polo match in England, though reports of a bee incident at the scene remain unverified.
headline: ‘I Stand By Them’: Sunjay Kapur''''s Sister Backs Karisma Kapoor Kids In Rs 30,000 Cr Estate Fight

author: News18
summary:
Even today, while Bollywood continues to churn out big-budget and star-studded releases, some films from the past continue to hold a special place in audiences’ hearts. Between 2004 and 2010, several movies not only captivated viewers with their storytelling, performances and music but also broke box office records, setting new benchmarks for success. Here is a look at seven of the most successful and memorable films released during this golden period of Bollywood. (News18 Hindi)
Veer-Zaara (2004): Directed and produced by Yash Chopra and written by his son Aditya Chopra, this romantic drama starred Shah Rukh Khan and Preity Zinta. The story follows ‘Veer Pratap Singh’, an Indian Air Force officer, and ‘Zara Hayat Khan’, the daughter of a Pakistani politician. The highest-grossing film of 2004 also featured a star-studded supporting cast, including Amitabh Bachchan, Hema Malini, Manoj Bajpayee and several others. (News18 Hindi)
No Entry (2005): A comedy film, written and directed by Anees Bazmee and produced by Boney Kapoor, starred Anil Kapoor, Salman Khan, Fardeen Khan, Bipasha Basu, Esha Deol, Lara Dutta and Celina Jaitley. It was an official remake of the Tamil film Charlie Chaplin (2002) and became the highest-grossing film of 2005. (News18 Hindi)
Dhoom 2 (2006): Directed by Sanjay Gadhvi and produced by Aditya Chopra under Yash Raj Films, Dhoom 2 was the action-packed sequel to Dhoom (2004). The film starred Hrithik Roshan, Abhishek Bachchan, Aishwarya Rai, Bipasha Basu and Uday Chopra. It emerged as the highest-grossing film of 2006. (News18 Hindi)
Om Shanti Om (2007): A musical drama written and directed by Farah Khan, co-written by Mayur Puri and Mushtaq Sheikh, and produced by Gauri Khan, this film starred Shah Rukh Khan and Deepika Padukone in her Bollywood debut. Featuring a story based on reincarnation, the film also included Shreyas Talpade, Kirron Kher and Arjun Rampal, and became the highest-grossing film of 2007. (News18 Hindi)
Ghajini (2008): Directed by AR Murugadoss with a screenplay by Aamir Khan, this psycho-action thriller was a remake of Murugadoss’s 2005 Tamil film of the same name. The film starred Aamir Khan, Asin, Jiah Khan and Pradeep Rawat, and became the highest-grossing film of 2008. (News18 Hindi)
3 Idiots (2009): Written and directed by Rajkumar Hirani, this comedy-drama featured Aamir Khan, R. Madhavan and Sharman Joshi in the lead roles, with Kareena Kapoor, Boman Irani, Mona Singh and Omi Vaidya in supporting roles. It struck a chord with audiences and became the highest-grossing film of 2009. (News18 Hindi)
Dabangg (2010): Directed by Abhinav Singh Kashyap and produced by Malaika Arora and Arbaaz Khan, this action-comedy starred Salman Khan, Sonakshi Sinha, Arbaaz Khan and Sonu Sood. With supporting performances by Om Puri, Dimple Kapadia, Vinod Khanna, and Anupam it became the highest-grossing film of 2010. (News18 Hindi)
headline: 7 Bollywood Blockbusters That Dominated The Box Office Between 2004 And 2010

author: News18
summary:
When Govinda’s Biwi No. 1 Sunita Ahuja and Sonali Bendre meet on stage, expect a cocktail of nostalgia, laughter, and unfiltered fun. COLORS’ Pati Patni Aur Panga – Jodiyon Ka Reality Check set the stage for exactly that, as fans were treated to an evening packed with Govinda memories, Sunita’s playful candour, and a celebration of her legendary humour. From the moment Munawar Faruqui tried to pull Sunita into a dance, she was ready with her trademark wit, joking, “Main teri Biwi No. 1 thodi hu jo tu mere saath dance kar raha hai!” The episode immediately set the tone for Sunita to take charge of the conversation.
Sunita Ahuja Drops Shocking Revelations About Govinda
The highlight of the night arrived when Sunita revealed a secret that had fans and contestants in splits: while Govinda had playfully charmed nearly every actress he worked with, Sonali Bendre was the one woman he never flirted with. The confession had the jodis gasping and the audience roaring with laughter, with Sonali blushing on stage. Sunita also surprised everyone by unveiling a life-sized standee of Govinda, sparking a full-blown dance session to Main Toh Raste Se Jaa Raha Tha, featuring Sonali, Sunita, and the contestants. Adding to the comedy, Sudesh Lehri hid behind the standee, mimicked Govinda, and landed a playful slap on Abhishek Kumar, keeping the energy hilariously alive.
The laughter soon transitioned into a playful “marital report card” segment when Isha Malviya asked Sunita to rate her husband. Known for his forgetfulness, Govinda earned a 7 for responsibility. The real shocker came when Sunita rated his loyalty: mischievously giving him a 6, she left everyone in splits. The moment reaffirmed that Sunita’s candid humour and playful honesty remain unmatched in entertaining audiences.
Reflecting on her experience, Sunita shared, “Being on Pati Patni Aur Panga was like taking a beautiful walk down memory lane, filled with nostalgia and laughter. I loved dancing to Govinda’s songs again, sharing the stage with Sonali, and enjoying the playful energy of so many lovely jodis. Spending that time with Sonali was extra special — we laughed and remembered fun moments from the past. I revealed that while Govinda may have flirted with many, Sonali hi bach gayi bas! It was truly special to relive those moments, share a few untold truths, and celebrate the Govinda-style entertainment that has always been such a big part of my life.”
headline: ‘Sonali Bendre Hi Bach Gayi Bas’: Sunita Ahuja Spills Shocking Truth About Govinda

author: News18
summary:
Bollywood actress Karisma Kapoor‘s children, Samaira Kapoor and Kian Raj Kapoor, have recently come into the spotlight due to their involvement in a property dispute following the death of their father, Sunjay Kapur. The family is now facing a legal battle over the late businessman’s estate.
Shared A Deep Bond With Their Father
Samaira and Kian, who generally avoid the limelight, are now at the centre of public attention. The siblings, who have been living with their mother for the past nine years, had a close relationship with their father. They frequently went on trips and dining outings with him and were deeply affected by his passing.
Samaira Carves Her Path Overseas
Samaira, now 20 years old, is the first child of Karisma Kapoor and Sunjay Kapur. Born on March 11, 2005, she has excelled academically and is currently pursuing an undergraduate degree at Tufts University in Massachusetts, USA. Her LinkedIn profile indicates an interest in international relations or business, and she seems focused on her education rather than entering Bollywood.
What Is Kian Doing Now?
Meanwhile, Kian, born five years after Samaira, is currently living in Mumbai and attending a reputed school. At 15 years old, he is a shy child who stays away from the paparazzi and is often seen with his mother during family outings.
Samaira And Kian Move Court Against Stepmother
After the death of their father Sunjay Kapur, Samaira and Kian are fighting a legal battle in the Delhi High Court over his Rs 30,000 crore estate. Following Sunjay Kapur’s sudden passing in June 2025, his wife Priya Sachdev has been accused of tampering with his will and transferring all personal assets to her name. 
The will, dated March 21, 2024, has been challenged by the children, who are demanding a one-fifth share in their father’s property, including company shares, real estate and investments.
The Delhi High Court on Wednesday took up the property dispute case involving Sunjay Kapur’s children, Samaira and Kian. Justice Jyoti Singh issued summons to the defendants and directed them to submit written statements within two weeks, with rejoinders to be filed a week later. The matter is now listed for October 9.
On the interim relief sought by the plaintiffs, the court also sought replies within two weeks. In the meantime, Sunjay Kapur’s widow, Priya Sachdeva Kapur, has been asked to submit a complete list of his movable and immovable assets along with her response. The court will then consider whether to grant an ad-interim injunction.
Appearing for the children, Senior Advocate Mahesh Jethmalani argued that the will in question was never disclosed earlier, remains unregistered, and was allegedly read out hurriedly at the Taj Hotel. He called the circumstances suspicious, stressing that the executor reportedly learned of the will only a day before and that its disclosure came from a family staffer.
In her defence, Priya Kapur’s counsel, Senior Advocate Rajiv Nayar, contended that the case was not maintainable. He claimed that Samaira and Kian were already beneficiaries under an existing trust and had recently received assets worth Rs 1,900 crore. 
Sunjay Kapur’s mother, Rani Kapur, represented by Senior Advocate Vaibhav Gaggar, also raised objections. Expressing concern for her grandchildren, she said: “There seems to be something deeply wrong here. At 80, I am still seeking clarity. A trust set up by me excludes me entirely, and despite repeated requests, I was never given a copy of the will.”
headline: How Old Are Karisma Kapoor’s Children And What Are They Doing Now?

About film:
Directed by Shashank Khaitan, Sunny Sanskari Ki Tulsi Kumari features Varun Dhawan and Janhvi Kapoor in the lead roles alongside Sanya Malhotra and Rohit Saraf. The supporting cast of the film includes Maniesh Paul, Akshay Oberoi, Abhinav Sharma and others. As per IMDB, the film follows “Two former lovers in Delhi [who] try to rekindle old flames, leading to amusing mix-ups and deceptions. As chaos unfolds, a new, unexpected romance blooms. Who will find their happy ending amid the confusion?” The film is scheduled to hit the theatres on 2 October 2025.
A Look At Sunny Sanskari Ki Tulsi Kumari’s Teaser
The film’s teaser begins with Varun channeling his inner Amarendra Baahubali, originally portrayed by Prabhas in the SS Rajamouli film. His dramatic stance is quickly met with a witty remark from a friend, who says: “Ranveer Singh ki dhoti mein Prabhas ka paudha lag raha hai”. The teaser introduces all the main characters including Janhvi, Sanya and Rohit, and takes viewers through a world of dance, drama, colours and romance. It gives a clear glimpse of the excitement and energy the film has in store.
Sunny Sanskari Ki Tulsi Kumari: Star Cast And Plot
Directed by Shashank Khaitan, the film brings together a star-studded cast. Varun and Janhvi lead the story with Sanya and Rohit in pivotal roles. According to IMDb, the film revolves around “Two former lovers in Delhi try to rekindle old flames, leading to amusing mix-ups and deceptions. As chaos unfolds, a new unexpected romance blooms. Who will find their happy ending amid the confusion.” Sunny Sanskari Ki Tulsi Kumari is set to hit cinemas on October 2 coinciding with Dussehra.
headline: Sunny Sanskari Ki Tulsi Kumari: Janvhi Kapoor, Varun Dhawan''''s Chemistry Shines In Panwadi Song

summary: Abhishek Banerjee will reprise his role as the Compounder in Mirzapur: The Movie, set to begin filming next week in Mumbai. Filming will continue in Uttar Pradesh through December, with Pankaj Tripathi also returning as Kaleen Bhaiyya. The project aims to wrap by year-end, promising intense drama and key action sequences.

author: News18
summary: Tamannaah Bhatia, Diana Penty, and Nakuul Mehta promote their web series, Do You Wanna Partner, streaming on Prime Video from September 12. The trio was spotted outside Excel Entertainment’s office in Mumbai, sharing laughs as they posed for photos. The show follows best friends launching a craft beer brand while facing challenges in a male-dominated industry. Tamannaah also stars in Vann: Force of the Forest, while Diana will appear in Section 84.

author: News18
summary: Malaika Arora arrived at Mumbai airport, showcasing a stylish outfit with a white top, beige layer, black pants, and oversized green bag. Fans praised her chic look in a viral Instagram video, highlighting her status as a fashion icon. With minimal accessories and a simple bun, she continues to set trends in airport fashion, proving elegance can be effortless.

author: News18
summary: Sonakshi Sinha and Zaheer Iqbal recreated a famous dialogue from Dabangg to celebrate its 15th anniversary. They shared a video on Instagram, featuring Zaheer holding a 100 rupee note, mimicking Salman Khan. Their playful banter led to laughter as they filmed multiple takes. Fans reacted positively, with comments praising their chemistry and humor, while industry friends shared heart emojis. Dabangg marked Sonakshi''s film debut, featuring a star-studded cast.
